title: M-Three
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{CelestialBody |image= |name=M-Three |region=[[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' — Based on corresponding data for [[Klasse Ephemora system/Legends|Klasse Ephemora system]] |sector=[[Chiss Ascendancy/Legends|Chiss Space]] |system=[[Klasse Ephemora system/Legends|Klasse Ephemora system]]''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic III: Reunion]]'' |coordinates=F-9 |xyz= |distance= |suns=1: [[Klasse Ephemora (star)|Klasse Ephemora]] |orbited=[[Mobus/Legends|Mobus]] |position= |moons= |routes= |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class= |diameter= |atmosphere= |climate=[[Temperature/Legends|Cold]] |gravity=[[Gravity/Legends|Low]] |terrain=Cratered surface |water= |interest= |flora= |fauna= |otherlife= |species= |otherspecies= |socialgroup= |language= |government= |population= |demonym= |cities= |imports= |exports=[[Selenium/Legends|Selenium]] |affiliation= }} {{Quote|Master Skywalker, telemetry is picking up gravitation readings on the third moon of Mobus.''"
"''Source?''"
"''Unknown. But M-Three is little more than a rock. There can't be anything big enough down there to generate gravity waves.|[[Arien Yage]] and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]|}} '''M-Three''' was one of the seventeen [[Moon/Legends|moons]] of the [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] [[Mobus/Legends|Mobus]]. {{Moon-stub}} ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic III: Reunion]]'' {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=M-3 }} [[Category:Klasse Ephemora system locations]] [[Category:Low-gravity moons]] [[Category:Moons in the Unknown Regions]] [[Category:Rocky moons]]
